power_sensor.title: Select Power Sensor
power_sensor.description: Choose the sensor that provides the current net grid power (in Watts). Negative = surplus/export, positive = import.

boiler_config.title: Configure Boiler Controller Module
boiler_config.description: Enter the IP address or mDNS hostname of the boiler controller module (e.g. {example_host}).

error.no_power_sensors: No power sensors found in Home Assistant
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the boiler controller module

abort.already_configured: This boiler controller module is already configured
abort.unsupported_device: The discovered device is not a supported boiler controller module

init.title: Boiler Controller Options
init.description: Update the module host or power sensor.
